title: Variables, Expressions, Equations, and Practical Formulas · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Build reusable cost, distance, energy, and capacity formulas from stakeholder requirements. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a formula-driven planning calculator after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define variables with units and domains rather than treating letters as unlabeled blanks.
Substitute values into expressions with grouping, units, and intermediate reasonableness checks.
Solve one-variable linear equations while preserving equality at every transformation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
